'''ngabate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rhomboidally|rhomboidally]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-b-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rhomboidally|rhomboidally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngabate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:ngabate|ngabate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngabatesher|ngabatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngabatesherĂ«m|ngabatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngabatero|ngabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngabateshĂ«|ngabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngabateshĂ«m|ngabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingabatero|gokingabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingabateshĂ«|gokingabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingabateshĂ«m|gokingabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongabankerom|gongabankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongabankeshĂ«|gongabankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongabankeshĂ«m|gongabankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongabankeya|gongabankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngabaterom|ngabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngabatemu|ngabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngabateya|ngabateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingabaterom|gokingabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingabatemu|gokingabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingabateya|gokingabateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngababate|ngababate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngababatesher|ngababatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngababatesherĂ«m|ngababatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngababatero|ngababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngababateshĂ«|ngababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngababateshĂ«m|ngababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingababatero|gokingababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingababateshĂ«|gokingababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingababateshĂ«m|gokingababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongababankerom|gongababankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongababankeshĂ«|gongababankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongababankeshĂ«m|gongababankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongababankeya|gongababankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngababaterom|ngababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngababatemu|ngababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngababateya|ngababateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingababaterom|gokingababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingababatemu|gokingababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingababateya|gokingababateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngĂŠbĂŠte|ngĂŠbĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngĂŠbĂŠtesher|ngĂŠbĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m|ngĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠbĂŠtero|ngĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|ngĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|ngĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠbĂŠtero|gokingĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|gokingĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|gokingĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongĂŠbĂŠnkerom|gongĂŠbĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«|gongĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gongĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongĂŠbĂŠnkeya|gongĂŠbĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠbĂŠterom|ngĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠbĂŠtemu|ngĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngĂŠbĂŠteya|ngĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠbĂŠterom|gokingĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠbĂŠtemu|gokingĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingĂŠbĂŠteya|gokingĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngafbafte|ngafbafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngafbaftesher|ngafbaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafbaftesherĂ«m|ngafbaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafbaftero|ngafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngafbafteshĂ«|ngafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafbafteshĂ«m|ngafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafbaftero|gokingafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingafbafteshĂ«|gokingafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafbafteshĂ«m|gokingafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongafbafnkerom|gongafbafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongafbafnkeshĂ«|gongafbafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongafbafnkeshĂ«m|gongafbafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongafbafnkeya|gongafbafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafbafterom|ngafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafbaftemu|ngafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngafbafteya|ngafbafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafbafterom|gokingafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafbaftemu|gokingafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingafbafteya|gokingafbafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
